## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change, and why is it worth doing? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New or improved **rubric** (`rubrics/`)
- [ ] New **worked example** (`examples/`)
- [ ] **Spec** change (`spec/` — please open an issue first for discussion)
- [ ] **SDK / MCP / integration** code
- [ ] Docs / prompts
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] For code: `npm run build` passes in the package(s) touched
- [ ] For spec/rubric changes: schemas in `spec/*.schema.json` still validate
- [ ] For examples: includes the work, the interview, the six dimension scores, and the composite
- [ ] I can explain and defend this change myself — no "the AI wrote it" 🙂
